artifacts.title: Way receipt from 2025-08-11
artifacts.excerpt:
i started this account to connect with psychedelics and healing community three years ago. got way more than i bargained for and it pains me to see so clearly that it's time for this persona to be put to rest

because it's now a distraction from what i need to do. i'm not going to work as a psychedelic coach or try to get enlightened or whatever the heck this was maybe going to lead to. not now at least.

i have a sprint ahead of me to move our family of four to mexico and build a pizza bar from scratch. and i need focus my energy.

matthew dub must die so that matthew [pizza boy name pending] can live. 

not quite gone yet, but soon. 🥲 i will miss all of you dearly.💔

(ps i may start an ig to fully document our move and all of the fun and frustration along the way. moots may apply.)

this is hard to press send on. send tweet.

My son plays a game of running off to school in the morning without my hugs. Because he knows I will.

And so I get to parent two boys, now. Him, and me.

planets.name: Don
planets.summary: Archive cluster around don: 182 posts; 4 quote-backed receipts pinned.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2026-02-05
artifacts.excerpt:
rene girard and the buddha both predicted the same bug displayed in this loop

girard says desire is mimetic: you don't want the object, you want the fullness you see in whoever modeled it for you. the moment you get it, the spell breaks because the object was never the source of the glamor of their being. so you triangulate on a new object and a new model. as j-m oughourlian puts it in the mimetic brain, the self isn't even individual, but rather *interdividual*, a node in a field of borrowed desire. the "i" that plans for happiness in panel 1 is already constituted by someone else's wanting. there's no gru behind gru. the planning subject is itself a mimetic artifact.

in "the self between" eugene webb traces how desire doesn't merely move through the self, it produces the self. oughourlian's line is that desire is the only psychological motion capable of generating the self and breath
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, want, know, think.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-09-02
artifacts.excerpt:
But if humans don't feel safe in our herd (our families and communities) we can’t and won’t get back to 0. We get PTSD: undischarged ANS energy looping and retriggering as we confuse these stuck energies for threat itself.

Ongoing threat and abuse compounds this.
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, want, know, think.

artifacts.title: Don receipt from 2022-09-02
artifacts.excerpt:
But you don’t have to wait for lawmakers or scientists to give you permission to heal. Your body already knows how, and Saj's PSIP model can help you to let it.

Learn to go solo like me, or find a PSIP trained therapist: https://t.co/ctFG5L1EsO
artifacts.proof_of_search: Community Archive row → normalized post → topic planet. Terms: don, want, know, think.
